title: 75+ Science Experiments for Kids, Glow in the Dark Science Kit with Glowing Test Tube, Glowing Waves, Colorful Bouncy Balls, STEM Toys Christmas Birthday Gift for Girls and Boys
features: GLOW IN THE DARK SCIENCE KIT: Our science kit contains more than 30 unique glowing experiments, using safe light-up pigments that allow the experiments to quickly catch children's eyes in the form of light-ups, stimulating strong curiosity and fostering their interest in science. There is also a selection of more than 40 amazing chemistry experiments, children will start a full day of scientific exploration!

STIMULATE KID’S CREATIVITY AND IMAGINATION: Glowing Science Experiments are designed to inspire children's creativity and imagination, providing hours of educational STEM learning activities for boys and girls aged 8-12. They will create scientific experiments such as glowing snow, bouncy balls, and small animals, and gain a full sense of accomplishment from them.

EASY TO FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS: This STEM toy set includes two instruction manuals in German and English to cater for different language groups. Clear step-by-step pictures and professional scientific explanations will guide children to complete experiments independently and enjoy science.

HIGH-QUALITY SAFETY MATERIALS: Our science experiment kits are made from safe and high-quality experimental materials and come with high-quality safety bottle storage that is recyclable. Independent packaging design makes finding more convenient. The product contains detailed safety instructions and meets the requirements of the British Children's Toy Safety Standard.

THE PERFECT GIFT FOR LITTLE SCIENTISTS: This educational science toy is the perfect gift for little scientists for Christmas, birthdays, party events and more. Kids will improve their hands-on skills as well as logical thinking through fun scientific exploration.
